title: Graphics Mode Mnemonics
text: Graphics Mode Mnemonics The graphics mode set and rest mnemonics in the graphics mode for displays that support them graphics mode. Arguments Table 1. Mnemonics for Setting Graphics Mode Mnemonic Explanation _close Reset device from graphics mode. _init Initialize device in graphics mode. Description If init and close are also defined, these are activated before and after _underscore, _inverse, _high , and so on, to invoke and cancel graphics mode. These mnemonics are not used for printers. ^027=^027P1pW(R)S(C1(H0))W(F15)T’ ^_INIT ’^027/ ^_CLOSE Copy Related Links Session Mnemonics These mnemonics start and end a session. Secondary Process Color and Video Mnemonics The secondary process mnemonics instruct Uniface to perform the video feature in a secondary print or display process, that is, by printing the line a second time.
